# Quick Menu
> Radial pie menu plugin for Unreal Engine (4.27–5.7). Press V to access 44+ editor actions instantly. Context-aware, graph-configured, fully customizable.

## Documentation
- [Getting Started](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/getting-started/)
- [Graph System & Concepts](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/concepts/)
- [Node Reference](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/nodes/)
- [Customization & Settings](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/customization/)
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/shortcuts/)
- [Python Custom Code](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/python/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/troubleshooting/)
- [Changelog](https://quickmenuplugin.com/docs/changelog/)
- [Full AI-readable reference](https://quickmenuplugin.com/llms-full.txt)

## Videos
- #1 Quick Menu in 2 Minutes (install, press V, first impression)
- #2 Creating Your First Wheel (graph editor, Root, WheelOutput, adding actions)
- #3 Context-Aware Menus (Switch nodes, dynamic menus)
- #4 SubMenus & Nested Wheels (SubMenu node, composition)
- #5 Python Actions (CustomCode node, practical examples)
- #6 Blueprint Actions (ComponentOp, ComponentProperty)
- #7 Advanced Graph Patterns (combining everything)
